meaning: n.因特别精彩而被掌声打断的表演
examples: Her natural creativity and artistic talent make her home a real showstopper.
I also have no doubt that this amp will be a showstopper.
But on this occasion, unlike previous ones, the budget he delivered was a showstopper.
Served on a bed of green beans mixed with yogurt and aromatic herbs, tabaka is a showstopper.
In Tiziano, which runs until 16 June, one showstopper follows the next.
